title: Model-squeeze SDMMC0 access-control lead audit
model_routes: Strix Qwen3.6 27B Dense ROCmFP4-MTP headQ6 GGUF rocmfp4-llama ROCm+Vulkan ctx256k self-spec reasoning-off coding
3090 Qwen3.6 27B Dense Q4_K_M GGUF llama.cpp CUDA ctx64k chat
7900XT Qwen3.6 27B Dense Q4_K_M GGUF llama.cpp Vulkan ctx8k research
openrouter-free / Auto Free Router random available free model
question: Do four model routes plus local source cross-check identify a non-repeated, source-backed A733 SDMMC0 IDMAC memory-access delta?

checks.finding: repeat of H009-H069 closed classes; not promoted without new source evidence

checks.lead: force single/no-fixed burst for descriptor fetch
checks.finding: already covered by H017/no-fixed-burst evidence; status notes fixed-burst removal changed DMAC readback but still reached RINTR=0x24 and IDST=0x4000

checks.lead: AHB bus matrix / firewall / security / NSI / MBUS master bit
checks.finding: direct searches across Orange Pi full tree, BSP slice, diagnostic tree, and public U-Boot did not expose an A733 SDMMC0-specific setup register or property

decision: Do not patch from model speculation. Keep blocker unchanged: need maintainer/list/vendor reply or a concrete source-backed SDMMC0 master/firewall/security bit.
next_responsible_step: Monitor email/public archives and continue source acquisition; only build a kernel if a new register or handoff bit is identified.
